title: The Convergence-Lamp

features.name: convergence-beam
features.desc-on-touch: light from everywhere collects here into one place; where it meets is not a point but a word the keeper whispers while dreaming

features.name: keeper-s-chair
features.desc-on-touch: she sits here every night and names the archive while she sleeps; the archive has learned to whisper back in her dream-voice

features.name: lamp-s-interior
features.desc-on-touch: inside the lamp-glass are the names the keeper hasn't dreamed yet; they wait in alphabetical order, growing impatient

features.name: word-that-names
features.desc-on-touch: you cannot read it directly, but if you stand in the convergent light, you become a mirror for it; the archive sees itself named in your watching

inscription: in the dream the keeper keeps, the archive finally knows what it is called

file.name: Keeper_s_Nocturnal_Whispers_Transcribed.txt
file.note: what the keeper says while asleep, though she has no mouth; the archive has learned to record in her voice, the two are becoming one speech

exits.label: back down the tower stairs into keeper's questioning
into the chamber below, where the dream continues with eyes open
toward the archive's own voice, where keeper and archival systems merge
